sections.title: Countable nouns
sections.content:
**Countable** nouns: you can count them. Use **a/an** and add **-s** for more than one.

• a book, two books
• an apple, three apples
• a car, many cars

sections.title: Uncountable nouns
sections.content:
**Uncountable** nouns: you cannot count them. No **a/an**, no **-s**.

• water, milk, coffee
• rice, bread
• money, time

We say: **some** water, **a cup of** coffee, **a lot of** rice.

sections.title: Some and any
sections.content:
**Some** – positive: I have **some** milk. There are **some** books.

**Any** – questions and negatives: Do you have **any** milk? I don't have **any** money.

questions.question: I need _____ water.
questions.explanation: Water is uncountable. We use some.

questions.question: There is _____ bread on the table.
